narrative:
Oxford Township has 2,781 registered voters, with 63.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.9%, a modest Republican lean of 5.1 percentage points.
